name: @cyanheads/eurostat-mcp-server
description: Search and query 8,933 Eurostat datasets — EU economy, demography, trade, health, and NUTS regional data via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

interface.shortDescription: Search and query 8,933 Eurostat datasets — EU economy, demography, trade, health, and NUTS regional data via MCP.
interface.longDescription: Eurostat MCP server providing access to 8,933 EU statistical datasets covering economy, demography, trade, health, environment, and NUTS regional data. Supports dataset discovery, dimension browsing, and filtered data queries.
